gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands with a welcoming smile, opens arms wide, and steps forward to engage the students about special numbers
a tutor leans slightly forward, tilts their head, raising one hand with a questioning gesture toward the class
a person holds up both hands, extends fingers on each, and moves them in a counting motion while engaging the learners
a tutor lifts one hand with five fingers and then the other hand with five fingers, confidently showing that together they equal ten
a person gestures enthusiastically with both arms, encouragingly inviting the class to grab ten blocks from a designated area
a tutor holds one hand out with five fingers extended, then moves the other hand toward the first as if adding five more blocks
a person claps hands joyfully, stepping back slightly and smiling brightly to celebrate the students' success in addition
a tutor raises both arms in excitement, nodding enthusiastically while offering encouragement and praise for the students' skills
